providerDescriptions.plivo: Ajya'ol oyonik rik'in ch'utin rajil xuqujeʼ jeb'ël API. Utz rech ri man nim ta kib'anon.
providerDescriptions.asterisk: K'uxlab'al awech rech nim ucholajem xuqujeʼ ch'utin rajil pa jujun minuto. Rajawaxik ruchojmixik k'uxlab'al.

notifications.statusDenied: Ri taq rutzijol eq'atal. Tajalwachij ri uchojmixik ri ak'uxlab'al rech kejaqax.
notifications.statusUnsupported: Ri ak'uxlab'al man kutikir ta ri taq rutzijol.

pwa.installText: Tachojmirisaj re k'uxlab'al re' rech aninaq okem xuqujeʼ utz rub'eyal.

pinChallenge.title: Tijikib'ax Ri Awetal
pinChallenge.description: Tatz'ib'aj ri PIN awech rech kasamajix re b'anoj re'.
pinChallenge.wrongPin: Man ütz ta ri PIN. {{remaining}} rayik k'a k'o.
pinChallenge.maxAttempts: Xek'is ri taq rayik. Ri etal xyujux.

recording.title: Ruyakik Oyonik
recording.error: Man xtikir ta xqasax ri yakb'al
recording.transcriptionFailed: Man xtikir ta ri rutz'ib'axik ch'ab'al
recording.transcriptionNotSupported: Ri ak'uxlab'al man kutikir ta ri rutz'ib'axik ch'ab'al waral
recording.transcribingLocally: Tajin katz'ib'ax waral — ri ch'ab'al man katelnaq ta pa ri ak'uxlab'al

rcs.title: B'eyal RCS
rcs.description: Google RCS Business Messaging rech nim taq tzijob'al.
rcs.fallbackToSmsDesc: Titaq rik'in SMS we ri RCS man k'o ta chi re ri winaq.

signal.title: B'eyal Signal
signal.description: Ewan taq tzijob'al chi uq'ij chi uq'ij rik'in Signal bridge.
signal.e2eeNote: Signal kuya' ewan chi uq'ij chi uq'ij k'a pa ri bridge. Ri taq tzijob'al ke'ewan chik rik'in ri taq etal rech ri oyonem tzij awech chuwach keyakoj.

security.transportLabel: Rutaqik: Signal (E2EE k'a pa bridge, ri utzilaj k'o)
security.bridgeDecryptionNotice: Signal kuya' utzilaj ewan rutaqik. Ri taq tzijob'al kejaqax pa ri bridge k'uxlab'al awech (pa ri ak'uxlab'al) rech kesamajix, xuqujeʼ ke'ewan chik rech keyakoj. Ri bridge rajawaxik ruchajixik ruma Signal kuk'ex ri rub'eyal.

signalRegistration.title: Rutz'ib'axik Rajilab'al Signal
signalRegistration.description: Tatz'ib'aj ri rajilab'al teléfono rech ri oyonem tzij awech rik'in Signal. Ri etal rech jikib'axik kak'ulux ruyonil pa ri petinaq SMS awech.
signalRegistration.useVoice: Takojo' jikib'axik rech ch'ab'al (rech VoIP taq ajilab'al)
signalRegistration.notConfigured: Ri rajilab'al Signal man tz'ib'an ta. Titz'ib'ax rech tijaqax ri taq tzijob'al Signal.
signalRegistration.waitingSms: Tajin kak'iy ri SMS rech jikib'axik...
signalRegistration.waitingSmsDescription: Ri etal rech jikib'axik kak'ulux ruyonil pa ri petinaq SMS awech. Katikir kak'iy jub'a' minutos.
signalRegistration.voiceDescription: Tatz'ib'aj ri 6 ajilab'al etal chi re ri oyonik rech jikib'axik.
signalRegistration.alreadyInProgress: Ri rutz'ib'axik tajin chik — tak'iy chi kak'is o tak'astaj ri raqan wuj.

deviceLink.title: Tik'am K'uxlab'al
deviceLink.description: Tichojmirisax re k'uxlab'al re' rik'in ruk'amik rik'in ri awetal winaq k'o chik.
deviceLink.instructions: Pa ri nab'ey k'uxlab'al awech, tib'e pa Uchojmixik xuqujeʼ tijaqax ri 'Taq K'aman K'uxlab'al' raqan. Chirij tatz'et ri QR etal o tatz'ib'aj ri etal waral kak'ut.
deviceLink.scanFromPrimary: Tatz'et re etal re' pa ri Uchojmixik ri nab'ey k'uxlab'al awech.
deviceLink.orEnterCode: O tatz'ib'aj re etal re' pa ri nab'ey k'uxlab'al awech:
deviceLink.expiresIn5: Re etal re' kak'is pa 5 minutos.
deviceLink.linkSuccessDesc: Ri awetal winaq k'o chik pa re k'uxlab'al re'. Tib'an jun PIN rech kuchajij.
deviceLink.linkFailed: Man xtikir ta xk'am ri k'uxlab'al
deviceLink.linkExpired: Ri ramaj rech ruk'amik xk'is. Tarayij chik.
deviceLink.linkedDevicesDesc: Tik'am jun k'ak'a' k'uxlab'al rik'in ri awetal winaq rik'in rutz'ib'axik ri etal.
deviceLink.linkFromPrimary: Rech kak'am jun k'ak'a' k'uxlab'al, tajaqaj ri K'uxlab'al pa ri k'ak'a' k'uxlab'al, tapitz'a' 'Tik'am re k'uxlab'al re'', xuqujeʼ tatz'ib'aj ri etal kak'ut ikim.
deviceLink.invalidCode: Man okel ta ri etal rech chojmixik. Tatz'et ri QR etal o tawachib'ej ronojel ri etal.
deviceLink.verifySASDesc: Tatz'et chi re junam re etal re' rik'in ri etal pa ri nab'ey k'uxlab'al awech.
deviceLink.verifySASPrimary: Tijikib'ax chi re junam re etal re' rik'in ri etal pa ri k'ak'a' k'uxlab'al:
deviceLink.compareCodes: Ka'ib' ri taq k'uxlab'al rajawaxik kek'ut ri junam etal. We man kejunamaj ta, MAN tib'an — jun aj elk'anel katikir k'o.
deviceLink.codesDontMatch: Man kejunamaj ta ri taq etal
deviceLink.sasMismatch: Ri taq etal rech ruchajixik man xkijunamaj ta. Ri ruk'amik xq'at rech aruchajixik. Tarayij chik.
deviceLink.decryptFailed: Man xtikir ta xjaqax ri etal chi re ri nab'ey k'uxlab'al. Tarayij chik.
deviceLink.cameraPermission: Rajawaxik ri okem pa ri ruk'utu'n rech ketz'et ri taq QR etal
deviceLink.codesMismatch: Man Kejunamaj Ta ri Taq Etal
deviceLink.verifySubtitle: Tijikib'ax chi ri etal kejunamaj pa ka'ib' taq k'uxlab'al

hubs.title: Rub'anik Hub
hubs.createHubDescription: Tib'an jun k'ak'a' hub rech kachojmirisax ri samaj rech ri oyonem tzij awech.
hubs.editHubDescription: Tik'astaj ri rub'i', ruch'ab'al, o rajilab'al teléfono rech ri hub.
hubs.hubNamePlaceholder: achi'el Oyonem Tzij rech K'ayewal NYC
hubs.hubDescriptionPlaceholder: Ko'öl ruch'ab'al rech achike rub'antajik re hub re'...
hubs.hubPhoneNumberHelp: Ri nab'ey rajilab'al teléfono rech re hub re' (E.164 ruwach).
hubs.noHubs: Majun hub k'o. Tib'an jun hub rech katikirisax ri samaj rech ri oyonem tzij awech.
hubs.archiveHubConfirm: ¿La katzalij chi awech katiyakoj "{{name}}"? Re hub re' ke'ewax pa ri cholajil samajin.
hubs.deleteHubConfirm: ¿La katzalij chi awech katiyuj "{{name}}" rech junab'ey? Re b'anoj re' man katikir ta katzolij.
hubs.deleteHubNameLabel: Tatz'ib'aj ri rub'i' hub rech tijikib'ax
hubs.deleteHubActiveCallsError: Man katikir ta kayuj jun hub rik'in oyonik tajin kasamaj

accessControl.title: Rokem B'anel rech Ronojel
accessControl.allowSuperAdmin: Tiya' q'ij chi re ri b'anel rech ronojel rech kutz'et ri etamab'al re hub re'
accessControl.description: We tztapital, ri b'anel rech ronojel man katikir ta kujaqaj ri taq tz'ib'atajem rech oyonik, taq tzijoxik, o taq rutzijol. Re' kab'an rik'in rewan — man xa jun rutzilaj q'ij.
accessControl.enableConfirm: Re' kuya' q'ij chi re ri b'anel rech ronojel rech kutz'et ri k'ak'a' taq etamab'al pa re hub re'. Man kekojoq ta okem pa taq etamab'al ojer. ¿Tisamajix na?
accessControl.disableConfirm: Re' kuq'at ri okem chi re ri b'anel rech ronojel pa re hub re'. Kesach ri okem pa ri k'ak'a' taq etamab'al pa ramaj. ¿Tisamajix na?

export.title: Teleq'aj Retamab'al Hub
export.description: Tiqasax jun ruwachib'al ri retamab'al ri hub awech chuwach kayuj. Ronojel ri teleq'an ewan E2EE.

blasts.title: Taq Taqonem Tzij
blasts.noBlasts: Majun taq taqonem k'o. Tib'an jun rech katikirisax.
blasts.selectOrCreate: Tacha' jun taqonem o tib'an jun k'ak'a'
blasts.fillRequired: Tatz'ib'aj ri b'i' xuqujeʼ ri tzijob'al
blasts.doubleOptInDesc: Rajawaxik ri taq tz'ib'anela' kejikib'aj chuwach kek'ul taq taqonem

preferences.title: Taq Chojmixik rech Tzijob'al
preferences.invalidToken: Man okel ta o xk'is ri ramaj rech ri okem rech taq chojmixik

geocoding.title: Ruchakuxik K'olib'al
geocoding.description: Tichojmirisax jun ajya'ol ruchakuxik k'olib'al rech tijaqax ri ruyonil rutzukuxik k'olib'al pa taq k'olib'al
geocoding.countriesHelp: Taq etal rech tinamit junam rik'in coma. Tiya' cholan rech ronojel ri uwachulew.
geocoding.testFailed: Man xtikir ta ri rayik rech okem

contacts.title: Taq Winaq
contacts.deleteConfirm: ¿La katzalij chi awech katiyuj re winaq re'?
contacts.duplicateWarning: Jun winaq rik'in re rajilab'al teléfono re' rik'in jub'a' k'o chik
contacts.notifyDescription: Titaq jun tzijob'al chi re {{name}} rik'in {{channel}}

users.title: Aj Samajela'
users.name: Rub'i'
users.inviteGenerated: ¡Ri sik'ixik xb'an! Tataq ri ewan etal pa jun chajin rub'eyal.
users.secretKeyWarning: Re etal re' kak'ut xa jun mul. Tataq pa jun chajin rub'eyal chi re ri aj samajel.
users.invalidPhone: Man okel ta ri rajilab'al teléfono. Takojo' E.164 ruwach (achi'el +12125551234)
users.deleteConfirm: ¿La katzalij chi awech kateleq'ax re aj samajel re'?
users.notFound: Man xriqitaj ta ri aj samajel
users.smsInsecureWarning: Ri SMS man ewan ta. Ri okem rech sik'ixik katz'et ruma ri aj k'amb'al tz'ib' xuqujeʼ katikir nik'aj chik.
users.smsAcknowledge: Wetaman chi ri SMS man chajin ta
users.smsAcknowledgeRequired: Rajawaxik katajikib'aj ri k'ayewal rech ruchajixik chuwach kataq rik'in SMS
users.noChannelsConfigured: Majun b'eyal rech tzijob'al chojmirisan. Takojo' Tiwachib'ex Okem rech kataq ri sik'ixik.

userProfile.messagingChannelsDescription: Taq b'eyal ri aj samajel re' katikir kub'an ucholajem
userProfile.messagingEnabledDescription: Tiya' q'ij chi re ri aj samajel re' rech kub'an ucholajem ri taq tzijoxik
